Class RsiFunction

java.lang.Object
com.ezylang.evalex.functions.AbstractFunction
grafioschtrader.evalex.RsiFunction
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.ezylang.evalex.functions.FunctionIfc
@FunctionParameter(name="period") public class RsiFunction extends com.ezylang.evalex.functions.AbstractFunction
Custom EvalEx function that computes the Relative Strength Index (RSI) for a given period. Usage in expressions: RSI(14), RSI(7). The function returns the most recent RSI value (0-100) computed from historical closing prices. Results are cached by period so that multiple RSI references with the same period compute only once.
